Integrated Pillars
What We Do

Four Integrated Pillars

The full-stack platform designed to build, scale, advise, and invest in Blue Economy innovation.

Venture Studio

We build BlueTech companies from scratch with in-house expertise, co-founding, and resources.

Idea to MVP
Learn more

Accelerator

We scale existing BlueTech startups with mentorship, pilot access, and funding readiness.

MVP to Revenue
Learn more

Consulting

Strategic advisory for maritime stakeholders — market entry, innovation strategy, and partnerships.

Any Stage
Learn more

Fund

Early-stage investment in Blue Economy innovators with capital and strategic support.

Seed to Series A
Learn more
Our Process

How It Works

From opportunity identification to global scale — a proven path.

01

Identify

We identify high-impact opportunities across the Blue Economy

02

Build or Select

We build ventures internally or select promising startups

03

Validate

We validate with industry partners and pilot programs

04

Scale

We scale with capital, networks, and strategic support

Blue Economy Sectors

Focus Areas

We operate across six high-impact verticals within the Blue Economy.

Smart Ports

AI-driven port operations, IoT sensor networks, and digital twin technology for next-generation port management.

Maritime Tech

Autonomous vessels, navigation systems, and maritime communication technologies reshaping global shipping.

Ocean Sustainability

Technologies and solutions protecting marine ecosystems while enabling sustainable ocean resource utilization.

Defense & Naval

Advanced naval technologies, maritime security systems, and defense innovation for sovereign capabilities.

Offshore Energy

Offshore wind, wave energy, and floating solar technologies driving the maritime energy transition.

Maritime Logistics

Supply chain digitization, cargo optimization, and last-mile maritime logistics innovation.

For You

Who We Work With

Whether you're building, investing, or innovating — we have a path for you.

Startups

Build or scale your Blue Economy venture with our studio and accelerator programs.

Start Building

Investors

Access curated deal flow and co-investment opportunities in BlueTech.

Corporates

Innovate with speed through strategic partnerships and consulting.

Leadership

Meet the Founders

Combined expertise in venture building, maritime industry, and strategic capital.

SE

Selcuk Ergin

Managing Partner / Strategy & Capital

Venture strategy, investment logic, fund structuring, and global expansion. The capital and strategy brain behind Mursel Ventures.

MA

Murat Avci

Managing Partner / Maritime & Industry

Deep maritime domain expertise with extensive industry partnerships, government relations, and corporate access across the Blue Economy.

Join the Future of the Blue Economy

Whether you're a founder, investor, or industry partner — there's a place for you at Mursel.
